content:
Wheel Unseen describes conceal incorrectly when viewed from collection. It falsely states that conceal has a maximum of 3 stacks. In a battle, conceal has an accurate description, maximum stacks 5.
Derison of Destiny says it will give extra charge for each dead enemy, but in battle it instead gives charge for each dead ally.
thread_title: Traphase inaccurate descriptions for Derison of Destiny and Wheel Unseen (Conceal)

content:
I am currently using a team of Castor, Tawil, Karen, and Timeworn Ramona.  However, after a certain point all cards stop discarding at the end of the turn.
I tested this against Casiah and Helot in the current event, but first noticed it in the series of boss stages at the end of chapter 9.  I was recently told that only one boss stage was supposed to have this mechanic, so the fact that the rest of them forced cards retention is strange.
Notably, this does not happen for other teams I use, such as the team of Melting Doll, Timeworn Ramona, Karen, and Nymphaea.
